overview: This U/R artifact deck leverages fast mana from Mox Opal and Lotus Petal to accelerate into Goblin Welder recursion. By combining red aggression with blue control, it applies early pressure while maintaining the flexibility to disrupt opponents. The goal is to establish an artifact engine that generates consistent value and closes out games through relentless board presence.
win_conditions: Early artifact pressure combined with red removal
Blue spell suite disruption enabling finishers

keep_criteria: Hands with fast mana and a one- or two-drop
Hands containing Goblin Welder alongside artifact support
Hands featuring blue interaction paired with early threats
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking artifact synergy or fast mana
Hands composed entirely of high-cost cards
Hands without early disruption or threats

early_game: Deploy Mox Opal and Lotus Petal immediately to accelerate mana
Play low-cost artifacts to enable Goblin Welder activations
Use red instant-speed removal to clear early blockers
mid_game: Activate Goblin Welder to fetch key artifacts from the graveyard
Cast blue control spells to protect your board state
Build a resilient artifact engine that pressures the opponent
late_game: Loop Goblin Welder and artifacts to generate infinite value
Cast high-impact finishers to close the game
Maintain card advantage through continuous artifact recursion

key_cards.name: Mox Opal
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to enable early Goblin Welder or artifact drops; prioritize hands with artifact synergy.

key_cards.name: Lotus Petal
key_cards.notes: Provides early mana for blue spells or artifact casting; often paired with Opal for turn-two plays.

key_cards.name: Goblin Welder
key_cards.notes: Sacrifice artifacts to fetch key pieces from the graveyard; use repeatedly to generate value and disrupt opponents.

sequencing_tips: Always play Mox Opal before Lotus Petal when artifact mana is required
Hold blue counterspells for opponent's key threats rather than early swats
Sacrifice expendable artifacts first to protect your core engine pieces
Activate Goblin Welder before opponent's instant-speed removal resolves

matchups.advice: Race with early artifact pressure and use Welder to fetch disruptive artifacts.
Prioritize red removal and use artifacts for early blockers or finishers.
Disrupt their casting sequence with blue interaction and use Welder to find answers.
